FeatureNode.Name: PollingParamChgTime
FeatureNode.Desc_En: The last modification time of the current Polling parameter
FeatureNode.Desc_Cn: 当前库参数上一次修改的时间

FeatureNode.Name: PollingParamEnable
FeatureNode.Desc_En: Control the current group participate the polling process
FeatureNode.Desc_Cn: 使能该轮询组后，可以配置该轮询组的各项参数

FeatureNode.Name: PollingSingleParamTimeout
FeatureNode.Desc_Cn: 配置当每一轮询组单组轮询超时时间（毫秒）

FeatureNode.Name: PollingSingleParamCodeNum
FeatureNode.Desc_En: PollingStopCodeNum Specified polling stop code num.
FeatureNode.Desc_Cn: 设置轮询所需要读到的最少条码个数

FeatureNode.Name: PollingSingleParamPeriod
FeatureNode.Desc_Cn: 配置每一轮询组单组重复轮询次数

FeatureNode.Name: PollingAlgoROIRegionIndex
FeatureNode.Desc_En: Polling Single Param Algo ROI Region
FeatureNode.Desc_Cn: 配置每一轮询组关注的ROI区域

FeatureNode.Name: CodeInfoSettings
FeatureNode.Desc_En: Code types identified during configuration polling
FeatureNode.Desc_Cn: 配置轮询时识别的码制

FeatureNode.Name: PollingLightColor
FeatureNode.Desc_En: Select the source of light color

FeatureNode.Name: PollingLightSelector
FeatureNode.Desc_Cn: 配置每一轮询组对应的各路补光灯

FeatureNode.Name: PollingLightEnable
FeatureNode.Desc_Cn: 配置每一轮询组对应的轮询补光灯某一路是否使能

FeatureNode.Name: PollingIOSelector
FeatureNode.Desc_En: Selects the physical line (or pin) of the external device connector to configure(Polling).
FeatureNode.Desc_Cn: 选择要配置（轮询）的外部设备的连接线路（或引脚）

FeatureNode.Name: PollingIOAction
FeatureNode.Desc_En: Selects which internal acquisition or I/O source signal to output on the selected line.
FeatureNode.Desc_Cn: 选择线路上输出内部采集信号

FeatureNode.Name: PollingExposureTime
FeatureNode.Desc_Cn: 配置每一轮询组对应的轮询曝光时间

FeatureNode.Name: PollingGain
FeatureNode.Desc_Cn: 配置每一轮询组对应的轮询增益

FeatureNode.Name: PollingGamma
FeatureNode.Desc_Cn: 配置每一轮询组对应的轮询Gamma

FeatureNode.Name: PollingFocusEnable
FeatureNode.Desc_Cn: 配置每一轮询组轮询调焦位置使能

FeatureNode.Name: PollingFocusPos
FeatureNode.Desc_Cn: 配置每一轮询组轮询调焦位置
